docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, IVAN MEJIA DBA IVAN MEJIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UGBAJA, CHIDERAH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, IVAN MEJIA DBA IVAN MEJIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, IVAN MEJIA DBA IVAN MEJIA AS TO DEFENDANT UGBAJA, CHIDERAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, IVAN MEJIA DBA IVAN MEJIA UGBAJA, CHIDERAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF IVAN JEJIA RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHIDERAH UGBAJA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-03-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT UGBAJA, CHIDERAH
